eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Churchill; Clark; Douglas; Elko; Esmeralda; Eureka; Humboldt; Lander; Lincoln; Lyon; Mineral; Nye; Pershing; Storey; Washoe; White Pine; Carson City, NV; at 7:10 AM on JUL 21, 2026 Effective until 8:10 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the Emergency Alert System.  This is only a test.  No action is required
